title: Method and apparatus for measurement skipping in a wireless communication system
abstract: A method and apparatus for measurement skipping in a wireless communication system is provided. The method comprises: receiving a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps; skipping measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and transmitting information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped.
claims: Claims ( 30 ) A method performed by a wireless device in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps; skipping measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and transmitting information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: determining that the at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements based on that uplink transmission and/or downlink reception is performed during the at least one measurement gap. The method of claim 2, wherein the uplink transmission and/or the downlink reception is performed for urgent data. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: receiving information related to a condition for skipping measurements. The method of claim 4, wherein the method further comprising: determining to skip measurements for at least one neighbour frequency based on the condition is met. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: skipping measurements for a second neighbour frequency based on a concurrent measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and skipping transmitting information related to the second neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, based on that the concurrent measurement gap is associated with the second neighbour frequency. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: transmitting a measurement report based on that at least one measurement condition is met, wherein the measurement report includes the information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: transmitting a certain message including the information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, upon skipping the measurements for the first neighbour frequency. The method of claim 8, wherein the certain message is a measurement report or a assistance information message. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: performing measurements for a third neighbour frequency instead of the first neighbour frequency based on the at least one measurement gap being unavailable for measurements. The method of claim 10, wherein the third neighbour frequency has higher priority than the first neighbour frequency. The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprising: performing measurements for at least one neighbour frequency in the order of measurement priority, based on the at least one measurement gap being unavailable for measurements. The method of claim 1, wherein the wireless device is in communication with at least one of a user equipment, a network, or an autonomous vehicle other than the wireless device. A wireless device in a wireless communication system comprising: at least one transceiver; at least one processor; and at least one memory operably connectable to the at least one processor and storing instructions that, based on being executed by the at least one processor, perform operations comprising: receiving a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps; skipping measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and transmitting information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: determining that the at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements based on that uplink transmission and/or downlink reception is performed during the at least one measurement gap. The wireless device of claim 15, wherein the uplink transmission and/or the downlink reception is performed for urgent data. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: receiving information related to a condition for skipping measurements. The wireless device of claim 17, wherein the operations further comprising: determining to skip measurements for at least one neighbour frequency based on the condition is met. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: skipping measurements for a second neighbour frequency based on a concurrent measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and skipping transmitting information related to the second neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, based on that the concurrent measurement gap is associated with the second neighbour frequency. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: transmitting a measurement report based on that at least one measurement condition is met, wherein the measurement report includes the information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: transmitting a certain message including the information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, upon skipping the measurements for the first neighbour frequency. The wireless device of claim 21, wherein the certain message is a measurement report or a assistance information message. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: performing measurements for a third neighbour frequency instead of the first neighbour frequency based on the at least one measurement gap being unavailable for measurements. The wireless device of claim 23, wherein the third neighbour frequency has higher priority than the first neighbour frequency. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the operations further comprising: performing measurements for at least one neighbour frequency in the order of measurement priority, based on the at least one measurement gap being unavailable for measurements. The wireless device of claim 14, wherein the at least one processor is further adapted to be in communication with at least one of a user equipment, a network, or an autonomous vehicle other than the wireless device. A processor for a wireless device in a wireless communication system, wherein the processor is adapted to control the wireless device to perform operations comprising: receiving a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps; skipping measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and transmitting information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. A non-transitory computer-readable medium having stored thereon a plurality of instructions, which, when executed by a processor of a wireless device, cause the wireless device to perform operations, the operations comprising, receiving a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps; skipping measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements; and transmitting information related to the first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped. A method performed by a base station in a wireless communication system, the method comprising, transmitting, to a wireless device, a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps, receiving, from the wireless device information related to a first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, wherein the wireless device skip measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements. A base station in a wireless communication system comprising: a transceiver; a memory; and at least one processor operatively coupled to the transceiver and the memory, and adapted to: transmit, to a wireless device, a measurement configuration including information related to one or more neighbour frequencies and information related to one or more measurement gaps, receive, from the wireless device information related to a first neighbour frequency for which the measurements are skipped, wherein the wireless device skip measurements for a first neighbour frequency based on that at least one measurement gap becomes unavailable for measurements.
